title: Premium Holidays in Central Asia
details: Explore the heart of Central Asia with this premium multi-country adventure covering Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, and Uzbekistan. Experience breathtaking lakes, mountains, cultural landmarks, ancient cities, and vibrant bazaars with guided tours, comfortable accommodations, and seamless travel arrangements.

itinerary.day_details: Meet at NAIA Terminal 3 for check-in and boarding. Flight: CZ3078 MNL–CAN 08:20–10:45, CZ3083 CAN–ALA 15:25–19:30. Arrival in Almaty, meet tour guide, transfer to hotel and check-in. Overnight in Almaty.
Visit Kok Tobe Hill, National Central State Museum, Republic of Kazakhstan landmarks, Panfilov Guardsmen Park, Ascension Cathedral, and Green Bazaar. Return to hotel. Overnight in Almaty.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/8D/6N Premium Holiday in Central Asia (Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Uzbekistan)/Day2_1774235356.png

itinerary.day_details: Visit Gunny Village and Issyk Lake. Return to hotel after tour. Overnight in Almaty.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/8D/6N Premium Holiday in Central Asia (Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Uzbekistan)/Day3_1774235360.png

itinerary.day_details: Transfer to Bishkek. Visit Ala-Too Square, Manas Statue, Mahmud Kashkari Mosque, and Ala-Archa Nature Park. Hotel check-in. Overnight in Bishkek.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/8D/6N Premium Holiday in Central Asia (Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Uzbekistan)/Day4_1774235363.png

itinerary.day_details: Visit Dungan Village, Burana Ruins & Tower, and Suyab. Transfer to airport and fly to Tashkent. Hotel check-in. Overnight in Tashkent.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/8D/6N Premium Holiday in Central Asia (Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Uzbekistan)/Day5_1774235369.png

itinerary.day_details: Visit Charvak Lake and Chimgan Mountain. Return to hotel. Overnight in Uzbekistan.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/8D/6N Premium Holiday in Central Asia (Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Uzbekistan)/Day6_1774235381.png

itinerary.day_details: Visit Hazrati Imam Complex, Kukeldash Madrasah, Chorsu Bazaar, State Museum of History of Uzbekistan, Tashkent Metro, and Amir Timur Square. Transfer to airport. Flight: CZ3054 TAS–CAN 21:30–07:10+1.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/8D/6N Premium Holiday in Central Asia (Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Uzbekistan)/Day7_1774235384.png

itinerary.day_details: Flight: CZ397 CAN–MNL 13:55–16:45. Arrival in Manila. Home sweet home.

inclusions: International airfare via China Southern Airlines
6 nights hotel accommodation (twin sharing, 5-star local hotels)
extra_details: Full payment 45 days before travel period
